raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, three fraudulent charges were posted to my American Express account : XXXX XXXX  XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  These charges were spaced almost exactly XXXXXXXX XXXX  apart, indicating a deliberate pattern of fraud. However, Amexs records in USD obscured this pattern, creating a conversion blind spot that allowed the fraud to pass undetected.

I immediately disputed the charges, but Amex failed to resolve them. Instead, the company delayed action for months. On XX/XX/year>, a {$240.00} charge was processed. On XX/XX/year>, fee reversals began, acknowledging that payments had been processed. Finally, on XX/XX/year>, a {$20.00} charge posted after months of delay. 

Throughout this period, I endured unresolved disputes, account lockout, and denial of access to funds. This created an emergency, lifethreatening situation in which I was XXXX, exposed to aggressors, and unable to meet basic survival needs. Amexs failure to provide timely resolution or complete information caused severe harm. 

I will provide documents and photos upon request. American Express already has copies of the fraudulent documents, all account information, recordings of the many calls I made while in distress, and other pertinent materials. I would like to spend more time detailing their mishandling, but I am currently surrounded by threats that require my immediate attention.
